name: Lean-donor intestinal microbiota transfer in metabolic syndrome
summary: Randomized human study comparing allogenic lean-donor versus autologous intestinal microbiota infusion in male recipients with metabolic syndrome, with insulin sensitivity and microbiota composition readouts at six weeks.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Ecosystem Replacement because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and mechanistic endpoints in Male adults with metabolic syndrome. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
